narration: Scientists can now cut DNA like text — and this is how CRISPR works.
visual_description: Hook visual: Scientists can now cut DNA like text — and this is how CRISPR works.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Scientists can now cut DNA like text — and this is how CRISPR works.

narration: Meet CRISPR-Cas9, a revolutionary tool that can edit genes with precision.
visual_description: Context visual: Meet CRISPR-Cas9, a revolutionary tool that can edit genes with precision.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Meet CRISPR-Cas9, a revolutionary tool that can edit genes with precision.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Meet CRISPR-Cas9, a revolutionary tool that can edit genes with precision.

narration: It uses a guide RNA to find the exact spot in the DNA sequence.
visual_description: Escalation visual: It uses a guide RNA to find the exact spot in the DNA sequence.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: It uses a guide RNA to find the exact spot in the DNA sequence.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: It uses a guide RNA to find the exact spot in the DNA sequence.

narration: Then, Cas9 acts like molecular scissors, cutting the DNA.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Then, Cas9 acts like molecular scissors, cutting the DNA.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Then, Cas9 acts like molecular scissors, cutting the DNA.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Then, Cas9 acts like molecular scissors, cutting the DNA.

narration: This allows cells to repair the DNA, potentially eliminating diseases.
